name: Apricot Jewels
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Mix the butter and cream cheese, then add to the flour mixture; blend well.
3. Add the coconut and apricot preserves and blend well.
4. Drop by teaspoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15-18 minutes until light brown.
6. Makes about 30 cookies
